reviews.comment:
En el shop ni te registran cuando entrás,saludas y no responden.no sos un cliente,si no alguien que va a molestar.
Ocurrió en reiteradas oportunidades y horarios...no fui nunca más!

(Translated by Google)
They don't even register you when you walk in at that shop. You say hello and they don't respond. You're not a customer, but someone who's there to cause trouble.

It happened repeatedly at different times... I never went back!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZME1LaVJ3EAE
